name: idea-refine
description: Drive one existing idea to a READY verdict from the idea-incubation-review gate — a bounded loop that gates the idea, reads the review's gaps, researches the web to close them (segment, competitors, pricing, revenue path — cited, never guessed), re-gates the refined idea, and repeats until READY or until it provably can't. Pushes back honestly instead of faking a pass: software-first fails, unclosable fatal gaps, and non-convergence stop the loop with a reshape-or-park recommendation. Fans out three refine analysts (market, business, buildability) that cite sources like idea-scout's. Requires the idea-incubation-review plugin installed (the gate). Use to fix a specific idea that failed review, not to generate new ideas.
